---
title : "Accion Colectiva En Plataformas Digitales de Reparto En America Latina"
date : "2024-01-01"
author : "Gutierrez-Crocco, Francisca; Ahumada, Pablo Perez; Carrasco, Kevin; Budnevich, Sebastian & Granadino, Dominique"
categories : ["Report"]
publication : "  Universidad Austral de Chile [https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.27618.50881](https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.27618.50881)"
publication_short : "  Universidad Austral de Chile [https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.27618.50881](https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.27618.50881)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Gutierrez-Crocco, Francisca; Ahumada, Pablo Perez; Carrasco, Kevin; Budnevich, Sebastian & Granadino, Dominique (2024). *Accion Colectiva En Plataformas Digitales de Reparto En America Latina*.   Universidad Austral de Chile [https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.27618.50881](https://doi.org/10.13140/RG.2.2.27618.50881)

:::
